bullets.title: What we do
bullets.content: We are a vibrant, active community that organizes scientific talks, workshops, and discussion events on complexity and network science. We maintain an active community on WhatsApp to stay connected year-round.

bullets.title: Who we are
bullets.content: We are a group of volunteers from Complexity Global Schools who came together to build on and extend the communities we found at CGS. We are an international community spanning over 30 countries.

bullets.title: Acknowledgements
bullets.content: We are deeply grateful to the members of SFI who have provided (and continue to provide) guidance and assistance to Complexity Coffee in its early and current iterations.
